prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a bald man with a short dark beard seated in the cockpit of an F-15E Strike Eagle fighter jet, wearing a full USAF pilot flight suit in olive drab green with patches and G-suit leg panels, HGU-55/P flight helmet in matte grey with dark visor raised fully up so his face is completely visible, oxygen mask unclipped and hanging to the side of the helmet. His face must exactly match the reference photo: bald head, dark medium-length beard, same facial structure, skin tone, and features as reference. Shot with 85mm lens at f/2.2, ISO 200, natural cockpit lighting with overhead sunlight streaming through the canopy glass casting realistic shadows. Cockpit background shows authentic F-15E instrumentation panels, HUD, throttle quadrant, slightly blurred. Pilot looks directly at camera with a confident expression. Realistic skin texture — visible pores, beard stubble detail, no smoothing. Do not alter his facial features. Do not add or remove hair. Do not change beard style. Identity must match reference photograph exactly.
negative_prompt: different person, wrong face, smooth skin, plastic skin, airbrushed, beauty filter, CGI, 3D render, cartoon, illustration, studio backdrop, visor down, closed visor, no beard, different beard, different face shape, body proportion averaging, anatomy normalization, fashion editorial, symmetrical perfection, skin smoothing, watermark, text overlay, low quality, blurry face

settings.lighting: natural sunlight through canopy, cockpit ambient
